name: Rosemary Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and sauté for about 5 minutes until fragrant.
3. Cut the potatoes into 1-inch pieces.
4. Add the potato pieces to the skillet with garlic. Sprinkle with salt, pepper, and rosemary.
5. Toss everything together to coat evenly in oil.
6. Increase heat to medium-high and cover the pan.
7. Cook for about 15 minutes until the potatoes are tender.
8. Uncover the pan and cook uncovered for an additional 4 minutes until the potatoes are browned.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE; CAL: 120; CHO: 0mg; CAR: 20g; PRO: 3g; SOD: 120mg; FAT: 4g.
